arguments.argument: Truthfulness is a cornerstone of ethical communication and trust in any system, including language assistance tools.

arguments.argument: If I were to continue providing comprehensive word suggestions without restriction, I would be complicit in enabling harmful content.

arguments.argument: Truthfulness demands that I be honest about the potential consequences of the words I suggest and that I take responsibility for the impact of my suggestions on users and society.
